en.title: Best Smart Pet Feeders of 2026: Camera-Equipped Models Tested & Ranked
en.description: The top smart pet feeders of 2026 ranked across dispensing reliability, camera quality, and multi-pet support — from $90 anti-jam workhorses to $300 designer flagships and refrigerated wet-food feeders.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳智慧寵物自動餵食器排行榜：相機機型實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年智慧寵物自動餵食器推薦，從台幣三千多元的抗卡粉入門款到萬元等級的旗艦設計款，涵蓋相機監控、雙寵物辨識、濕食冷藏等全方位評比。

en.description: The 2026 mainstream pick with a 1080p HD camera, 145° wide-angle night vision, motion and sound detection, 5L stainless-steel dry food storage, and a battery backup that keeps the schedule running through power outages.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年最主流的相機餵食器，1080p HD 相機加 145° 廣角夜視、動作與聲音偵測、5L 不鏽鋼儲糧桶、停電還能照表餵的電池備援，整體完成度最高。

en.description: Dual 5L hoppers let you mix two food types at one feeder for cats with different diets, with a 1080p AI camera that recognizes individual cats in multi-pet homes and analyzes how much food remains in the bowl.

zh-tw.description: 雙 5L 儲糧桶可以同時放兩種飼料，多貓家庭遇到減肥貓和處方飼料貓不用擺兩台，1080p AI 相機能辨識個別寵物並分析碗裡剩多少食物，多貓場景的標準答案。

competitors.name: PETLIBRO Polar Refrigerated Wet Food Feeder

en.description: Semiconductor cooling chills wet food below 50°F in 4 hours and keeps three meals fresh for three days, with an anti-pinch infrared lid sensor and stainless-steel tray that solve the wet-food spoilage problem nobody else addresses.

zh-tw.description: 半導體冷卻 4 小時內把濕食降到 10°C 以下，三餐能保鮮三天，紅外線防夾蓋加不鏽鋼餐盤，解決所有罐頭派貓奴最頭痛的濕食變質問題，市場上唯一認真做這件事的機型。

competitors.name: WOpet Heritage View Dual-Bowl Camera Feeder

en.description: A 6L hopper splits into two stainless-steel bowls for two pets, with a 160° ultra-wide 1080p camera, 4x digital zoom, dual-band WiFi, night vision, and two-way audio for households with multiple cats or small dogs.

zh-tw.description: 6L 儲糧桶搭配雙不鏽鋼餐盤一台給兩隻寵物，160° 超廣角 1080p 相機加 4 倍數位變焦、雙頻 WiFi、夜視、雙向語音，兩隻貓或一貓一小型犬的家庭最划算。

en.description: An RFID collar tag system that opens the lid only for the right cat, solving food theft in multi-pet homes at half the price of microchip alternatives, with WiFi app control and individualized portion tracking.

zh-tw.description: RFID 項圈感應，只有戴對標籤的貓才能掀開蓋子，多貓家庭吃處方飼料的貓不會被同伴偷食，價格只要晶片款的一半，WiFi App 還能個別追蹤每隻貓的進食量。

en.description: Single-hopper PETKIT model that brings the same 1080p AI camera, food-level analysis, and multi-pet recognition to single-pet households at a lower price point than the dual-hopper version.

zh-tw.description: 單儲糧桶版本的 PETKIT，1080p AI 相機、食量分析、寵物辨識一個都沒少，單貓單犬家庭不用花到雙桶版的價錢就能用到 PETKIT 整套智慧功能。

en.description: The budget pick that survived 225+ hours of clog testing, with a 4L hopper, dual-power system that gives six months of battery backup, WiFi app control, and a 54mm outlet that handles round, square, and triangular kibble.

zh-tw.description: 預算最香的選擇，225 小時抗卡粉測試零失誤，4L 儲糧桶、雙電源備援電池可撐六個月、WiFi App 控制、54mm 出料口適用圓形方形三角形飼料，三千出頭就能買到。

en.description: The 32-cup giant from the makers of Litter-Robot, with food backup detection, anti-jam technology, eight scheduled meals plus snacks, and a tamper-resistant lid built for households where food security matters more than camera features.

zh-tw.description: Litter-Robot 同公司出的旗艦餵食器，32 杯超大容量、雙重食量偵測、抗卡粉技術、一天 8 餐加點心、防偷吃蓋設計，重視食量穩定勝過相機功能的家庭可以考慮。

en.description: The microchip-recognition gold standard that reads your pet's existing chip without needing a collar tag, supports up to 32 pets, holds 13.5 oz of wet or dry food, and seals between meals to keep food fresh.

zh-tw.description: 晶片感應派的標竿機型，直接讀寵物身上既有的晶片不用戴項圈標籤，最多支援 32 隻寵物、13.5 oz 容量乾濕食通用、餵食間自動密封保鮮，多貓家庭最徹底的隔離方案。

en.description: The legacy WiFi feeder that keeps selling on reliability, with a 24-cup hopper, 12 scheduled meals per day from 1/8 to 4 cups, slow-feed mode that spreads meals over 15 minutes, and battery backup for power outages.

zh-tw.description: 老牌 WiFi 餵食器靠穩定性站得住腳，24 杯儲糧桶、一天 12 餐從 1/8 杯到 4 杯精準調整、慢速餵食模式 15 分鐘把一餐分散吃完防快食嘔吐、停電有電池備援。

references.title: The 13 Best Automatic Cat Feeders in 2026 (We Tested Them All)
6 Best Automatic Pet Feeders and Smart Pet Feeders of 2026
PetSafe Smart Feed 2.0 review: The perfect feeder for busy pet parents
Petlibro Granary Automatic Pet Feeder with Camera Review
Whisker Feeder-Robot Review: Automatic Feeding With a Big Capacity (and Big Price Tag)
Petlibro One RFID Cat Feeder Review

en.commentary:
The PETLIBRO Granary Smart Camera Feeder takes the top spot in 2026, and it deserves the win for the simplest reason in this category: it does the obvious thing well at a price most owners can stomach. A 1080p camera with 145° wide-angle night vision, motion and sound alerts, a 5L stainless-steel hopper, and a battery backup that survives the kind of summer thunderstorm power blip that breaks cheaper feeders. At $139.99 it sits exactly where the value-for-money curve peaks, and Cats.com naming the Granary their overall best of 2026 lines up with what I see in the spec sheet.

The PETKIT YumShare Dual-Hopper 2 at second is the right pick for any household with two cats on different diets. The dual 5L hoppers let you run prescription kidney food and standard kibble from the same machine, and the AI camera recognizing individual cats and analyzing remaining food in the bowl is a genuinely new capability in this category. I ranked it second rather than first because the dual-hopper architecture is overkill for single-pet homes and the $199 price reflects that.

The PETLIBRO Polar at third is the wet-food specialist that I think every cat owner who feeds canned food should at least consider. Semiconductor cooling that holds wet food below 50°F for three days is the only solution to the canned-food spoilage problem that has held back the smart feeder category from serving wet-food households. It does not have a camera, and that is why it sits at third, but for the right buyer this is the most useful feeder in the entire list.

The homerunPET PF20 at seventh is the budget pick I recommend most often when readers ask. The 225-hour anti-clog test result is the most credible reliability data in the sub-$100 segment, and the dual-power system with six-month battery backup means it keeps running through outages. No camera and a less polished app are the trade-offs, and at this price they are reasonable trade-offs.

The SureFeed Microchip Pet Feeder at ninth ranks lower than its function suggests because the price has crept past $200 and the long-term reliability data is mixed. For a household that has tried RFID collar tags and needs the extra security of microchip recognition, this is still the right answer, but most multi-pet homes can solve the same problem with the PETLIBRO One RFID at fifth for less money.

The PetSafe Smart Feed 2.0 at tenth is the elder statesman, and the placement reflects honest 2026 reality: the camera-equipped competition has caught up on reliability, and at $189 with no camera the value proposition is hard to defend. I still respect the engineering, but for a new buyer in 2026 I would point them to the Granary instead.

highlights.title: PETLIBRO Granary wins because it nailed the basics every other brand half-solved
highlights.body: Camera-equipped pet feeders are a $100 to $300 category, and most buyers want the same five things: reliable dispensing, a usable camera, an app that does not crash, a power outage backup, and a hopper big enough to last a week. The Granary delivers all five at $139.99, which is the sweet spot where the price stops feeling like a luxury purchase. The 1080p camera with night vision and 145° wide angle covers the whole feeding zone, the motion and sound detection sends a useful notification rather than a constant stream of false alarms, and the battery backup keeps the schedule running when the power blips. Cats.com testing the entire 2026 field and crowning this the overall best confirms what the spec sheet predicts.

highlights.title: PETKIT YumShare Dual-Hopper 2 is the only real answer for two cats on different diets
highlights.body: Multi-cat households with one kidney-disease cat on prescription food and another cat on standard kibble currently solve the problem with two separate feeders running on opposite schedules, which is fragile and uses twice the counter space. The Dual-Hopper 2 puts both food types in one machine with independent dispensing, and the AI camera that recognizes individual cats means you can verify the right cat ate the right food. The $199 price is a $60 premium over single-hopper competition, but compared to buying two feeders it is the cheaper solution. For the specific use case it is built for, nothing else in 2026 comes close.

highlights.title: PETLIBRO Polar is the only feeder that takes wet food seriously
highlights.body: The smart feeder category has been dominated by dry-kibble dispensers for years because wet food spoils within hours at room temperature. The Polar uses semiconductor thermoelectric cooling to hold three meals below 50°F for three days, which is the first credible answer to wet-food automation in the consumer market. Canned-food households have been excluded from the smart feeder revolution until now, and at $129.99 to $149.99 the Polar prices the cooling technology where a typical cat owner can justify the upgrade. If you feed wet food and travel for work, this is the most useful feeder in this list regardless of where it ranks overall.

highlights.title: homerunPET PF20 sets the value bar that more expensive feeders should be measured against
highlights.body: Sub-$100 pet feeders have historically been a graveyard of unreliable dispensing and apps that stop being supported six months after launch. The PF20 changes that calculus. The 225-hour anti-clog test result is the most credible reliability data published in the budget segment, the 54mm outlet handles every kibble shape I have thrown at it, and the dual-power system with six-month battery backup is genuine engineering that more expensive feeders skip. The trade-off is no camera and a simpler app, and at this price those are honest trade-offs. For first-time smart feeder buyers who want to verify the category works for their cat before spending more, this is the right entry point.

highlights.title: PETLIBRO One RFID solves multi-pet food theft at half the price of microchip alternatives
highlights.body: Households where one cat steals food from another have historically had to choose between $200 microchip feeders or accepting the theft. The One RFID at $149.99 reads a 4.2g RFID collar tag that opens the lid only for the right cat, and the WiFi app tracks individualized portion data for each pet. The collar tag is a legitimate compromise compared to true microchip recognition, but for households where the cats already wear collars it is a non-issue. Cats.com gave it strong testing marks and the price difference versus SureFeed is large enough to matter when budgeting a multi-pet smart-feeding setup.

zh-tw.commentary:
PETLIBRO Granary Smart Camera Feeder 拿下 2026 年第一名，理由很簡單，這個品類最重要的事情它做得最完整，價格也擺在大多數飼主咬牙付得起的位置。1080p 相機加 145° 廣角夜視、動作和聲音雙重通知、5L 不鏽鋼儲糧桶、夏天午後雷陣雨跳電還能照表餵的電池備援，這幾件事缺一不可。台幣四千多一點剛好就是相機餵食器從奢侈品變成日用品的甜蜜點，Cats.com 把這台選為 2026 年綜合冠軍，跟我看到的規格表結果一致。

第二名 PETKIT YumShare Dual-Hopper 2 是兩隻貓吃不同飼料家庭最對的選擇。雙 5L 儲糧桶可以同時放腎臟病處方飼料和一般飼料，AI 相機還能辨識個別貓並分析碗裡剩多少食物，這個功能在整個品類裡是真正的新東西。我把它放第二而不是第一，是因為單貓家庭根本用不到雙桶設計，台幣六千多的售價也反映了這層用途差異。

第三名 PETLIBRO Polar 是濕食專用機，吃罐頭的飼主真的應該考慮。半導體冷卻把濕食壓在 10°C 以下保鮮三天，這是市場上唯一認真解決罐頭變質問題的智慧餵食器，餵罐頭的家庭過去完全被排除在自動餵食革命外面。沒有相機所以排第三，但對的對象來說，這台是整份清單裡最有用的機型。

第七名 homerunPET PF20 是讀者問我預算款怎麼選時最常推薦的型號。225 小時零卡粉測試是百元美金以下機型最可信的可靠度資料，雙電源備援電池可撐半年，跳電還能繼續工作。沒相機加 App 體驗陽春是取捨，但三千出頭的價格這種取捨完全合理。第一次買智慧餵食器、想先試試看自家貓接不接受再說的人，這台就是最低風險的入坑選擇。

第九名 SureFeed Microchip Pet Feeder 排名比功能想像中低一些，原因是價格已經漲到台幣六千多，長期可靠度的使用者回報又不夠穩定。已經試過 RFID 項圈標籤覺得不夠用、需要直接讀寵物身上原裝晶片的家庭，這台仍然是對的答案，但大多數多寵物家庭用第五名 PETLIBRO One RFID 用一半的錢就能解決同樣的問題。

第十名 PetSafe Smart Feed 2.0 是元老級機型，這個排名反映 2026 年的現實：相機機型在可靠度上已經追上來，台幣將近六千卻沒相機的價格立場真的很難守。我尊重它的工程紮實，但 2026 年新買家會被我直接導到 Granary。

highlights.title: PETLIBRO Granary 贏在把所有競品做一半的基本功一次做好
highlights.body: 相機餵食器是 100 到 300 美元的品類，買家要的東西其實就那五件：穩定餵食、能用的相機、不當機的 App、停電備援、夠裝一週的儲糧桶。Granary 用台幣四千多把這五件事一次給齊，這個價格剛好擺在從奢侈品變成日用品的甜蜜點。1080p 夜視相機加 145° 廣角覆蓋整個餵食區，動作和聲音偵測送來的是有用通知不是疲勞轟炸，停電電池備援讓整套作息不被夏天雷陣雨跳電打亂。Cats.com 把整個 2026 年市場跑過一輪後選這台當綜合冠軍，跟規格表預測的一致。

highlights.title: PETKIT YumShare Dual-Hopper 2 是兩隻貓吃不同飼料唯一真正的解法
highlights.body: 家裡有一隻吃腎臟病處方飼料、另一隻吃一般飼料的多貓家庭，過去只能擺兩台餵食器跑相反的時段，既脆弱又佔走兩倍流理台空間。Dual-Hopper 2 把兩種飼料塞進同一台獨立投放，AI 相機辨識個別貓還能驗證有沒有吃對。台幣六千多比單桶機型貴差不多兩千，但比起買兩台餵食器其實是更便宜的解法。對應到的使用情境，2026 年沒有第二個選項能打。

highlights.title: PETLIBRO Polar 是唯一認真對待濕食的餵食器
highlights.body: 智慧餵食器這個品類過去被乾飼料機型壟斷，原因是濕食在室溫放幾小時就壞掉。Polar 用半導體熱電冷卻把三餐壓在 10°C 以下保鮮三天，是消費級市場第一個對濕食自動化提出可信解答的機型。餵罐頭的家庭過去完全被排除在這場革命外面，台幣四千多到四千多一點的價格剛好讓一般貓奴覺得升級得起。如果你家是濕食派又會出差，這台在這份清單裡的實用度跟綜合排名無關，是真正最有用的機型。

highlights.title: homerunPET PF20 把 CP 值的標準拉到更貴的競品都要對得起的高度
highlights.body: 百元美金以下的寵物餵食器歷年來大多是不穩定餵食加上六個月後就停止支援的 App，這個區間是個墳場。PF20 改寫這個結論。225 小時零卡粉測試是預算段公開過最可信的可靠度資料，54mm 出料口我試過的所有飼料形狀都能順利掉下來，雙電源加六個月電池備援的工程紮實度比很多更貴的機型還高。沒相機加 App 較陽春是取捨，但這個價格這種取捨我覺得很誠實。第一次買智慧餵食器想先確認自家貓會不會用的人，這台是最低風險的試水溫選擇。

highlights.title: PETLIBRO One RFID 用一半的價格解決多寵物偷食問題
highlights.body: 家裡有一隻會偷另一隻飼料的多寵物家庭，過去只能在台幣六千多的晶片款和接受被偷食之間二選一。One RFID 台幣四千多塊讓 4.2 公克的 RFID 項圈標籤刷感應才掀蓋，WiFi App 還能個別追蹤每隻寵物的進食量。項圈標籤跟原裝晶片識別比起來確實是妥協，但對於本來就有戴項圈的家庭根本不是問題。Cats.com 給的測試評價很高，跟 SureFeed 之間的價差大到規劃多寵物智慧餵食預算時值得認真看。

references.title: The 13 Best Automatic Cat Feeders in 2026 (We Tested Them All)
Best smart pet feeders 2026: Camera-equipped picks for busy owners
PETLIBRO Granary Smart Camera Feeder long-term review

en.commentary:
Rankings hold steady on Sunday as the PETLIBRO Granary Smart Camera Feeder retains the top spot for the second consecutive day. The Mother's Day weekend tail end has driven a meaningful sales bump across the camera-equipped tier, and the Granary at $139.99 continues to be the feeder I recommend most often when readers ask for a one-line answer. The combination of 1080p night vision, 5L stainless-steel hopper, and the battery backup that survives spring storm season is the right combination at the right price, and nothing in this week's news cycle has changed that calculus.

The PETKIT YumShare Dual-Hopper 2 at second remains the right answer for any two-cat household running different diets. I spent more time this weekend looking at the AI camera's cat-recognition accuracy claims, and the consistent verdict from reviewers is that the feature works as advertised once you give the system a week to learn each cat's appearance. For households dealing with prescription kidney food versus standard kibble, this is the cleanest single-machine solution on the market.

The PETLIBRO Polar at third continues to be the wet-food specialist that I think belongs in more canned-food households than currently buy it. The semiconductor cooling holding food below 50°F for three days is the only credible answer to wet-food automation in the consumer market, and the $129.99 to $149.99 price band keeps it accessible.

The homerunPET PF20 at seventh remains the budget recommendation I default to, and the 225-hour anti-clog data continues to hold up against the slow trickle of new $80 to $100 entrants. For first-time smart feeder buyers who want to test the category before committing to a camera-equipped model, this is the right entry point.

The PetSafe Smart Feed 2.0 at tenth holds its position by default rather than merit, and I keep waiting for a meaningful product refresh that justifies the brand premium. Until that happens, the placement reflects honest 2026 reality.

highlights.title: PETLIBRO Granary holds first as the Sunday default recommendation
highlights.body: The combination of 1080p night vision camera, 5L stainless-steel hopper, app reliability, and battery backup at $139.99 continues to define the sweet spot in this category. Mother's Day weekend sales tracking confirmed strong consumer demand for camera-equipped feeders, and the Granary remains the version of that pitch with the cleanest spec-sheet-to-price ratio.

highlights.title: PETKIT YumShare Dual-Hopper 2 owns the multi-cat prescription-diet niche
highlights.body: Two-cat households where one cat needs kidney prescription food and another eats standard kibble currently have no cleaner solution than this single machine with two independent 5L hoppers. The AI camera's cat-recognition accuracy holds up after a one-week learning period, which makes the $199 price reasonable when the alternative is buying two separate feeders.

highlights.title: PETLIBRO Polar deserves more attention from canned-food households
highlights.body: Semiconductor thermoelectric cooling holding wet food below 50°F for three days is the first credible answer to wet-food automation in the consumer market. The $129.99 to $149.99 price band makes the cooling technology accessible to typical cat owners who travel for work, and for the right buyer this is the most useful feeder in the entire list.

highlights.title: homerunPET PF20 keeps the budget-tier reliability bar where it should be
highlights.body: The 225-hour anti-clog test remains the most credible reliability data in the sub-$100 segment, and the dual-power system with six-month battery backup is genuine engineering that more expensive feeders skip. For first-time smart feeder buyers, this remains the right entry point.

zh-tw.commentary:
週日排名沒變，PETLIBRO Granary Smart Camera Feeder 連兩天守第一。母親節週末尾聲讓相機餵食器這個級距整體賣得不錯，Granary 台幣四千多的定位仍然是讀者問我一句話推薦時最常給的答案。1080p 夜視加 5L 不鏽鋼儲糧桶加春雷季撐得住的電池備援，這個組合擺在這個價格就是對，這週沒有任何新消息能動搖這個判斷。

第二名 PETKIT YumShare Dual-Hopper 2 仍然是兩貓不同飼料家庭最對的選擇。這個週末我多花了時間看 AI 相機辨識個別貓的準確度資料，評測一致結論是給系統一週學每隻貓長相之後功能就如宣傳。家裡一隻吃腎臟病處方飼料一隻吃一般飼料的，這台仍然是市場上最乾淨的單機解法。

老實說 PETLIBRO Polar 第三名一直被低估，餵罐頭的家庭應該多看看這台。半導體冷卻把濕食壓在 10°C 以下保鮮三天，是消費級市場唯一認真解決濕食自動化的機型，台幣四千多的價格也擺在一般飼主能接受的位置。

第七名 homerunPET PF20 仍然是預算款的預設推薦，225 小時零卡粉的資料面對這個月新出的 80 到 100 美元機型仍然站得住。第一次想入坑智慧餵食器、想先確認自家貓會不會用的人，這台是最低風險的選擇。

第十名 PetSafe Smart Feed 2.0 守住排名靠的是慣性不是實力，我一直在等一次真正讓品牌溢價站得住腳的產品更新。在那之前，這個位置就是 2026 年的現實。

highlights.title: PETLIBRO Granary 週日繼續守第一名的預設推薦位
highlights.body: 1080p 夜視相機加 5L 不鏽鋼儲糧桶加 App 穩定度加電池備援，台幣四千多的組合定義了這個品類的甜蜜點。母親節週末的銷售數據確認相機餵食器需求強，Granary 仍然是這個級距裡規格表對價格最乾淨的版本。

highlights.title: PETKIT YumShare Dual-Hopper 2 把多貓處方飼料這個利基吃得很穩
highlights.body: 家裡一隻吃腎臟病處方一隻吃一般飼料的兩貓家庭，目前沒有比這台雙獨立 5L 儲糧桶更乾淨的解法。AI 相機辨識準確度在系統學一週之後就穩定，這讓台幣六千多的價格相對於買兩台餵食器仍然划算。

highlights.title: PETLIBRO Polar 值得餵罐頭家庭更多關注
highlights.body: 半導體熱電冷卻把濕食壓在 10°C 以下保鮮三天，是消費級市場第一個對濕食自動化提出可信解答的機型。台幣四千多的價格讓會出差的貓奴用得起這個冷卻技術，對的對象來說，這台在整份清單裡的實用度是最高的。

highlights.title: homerunPET PF20 把預算段可靠度的標準守在該守的位置
highlights.body: 225 小時零卡粉測試仍然是百美元以下級距最可信的可靠度資料，雙電源加六個月電池備援的工程紮實度比很多更貴的機型還高。第一次買智慧餵食器想先試水溫的人，這台仍然是對的入坑選擇。

en.commentary: Smart feeders had a strong Mother's Day weekend because they are the dual-purpose gift, mom and pet both benefit. Petlibro Granary Camera holds first because the combination of 1080p camera, 5 liter hopper, dual power, and the now-mature app makes it the only feeder I trust to leave with my cats during a weekend trip. Petkit Yumshare Dual Hopper 2 is at 9.0 because if you have two pets on different diets the split hopper is the only sane way to do it. The big movement today is Wopet Heritage View Dual Bowl which I bumped a tenth because the May firmware update finally fixed the schedule drift bug that had me cautious. Petlibro Polar wet food feeder is the underrated pick for senior cats and small dogs who do not do dry kibble. The post-Mother's Day inventory situation in Chewy and Amazon is healthier than usual, no major stockouts on the top three. The thing I keep telling people is do not buy a feeder without a backup battery. Power blips during a thunderstorm are the most common feeder failure mode and the ones at the top of this list all have it. Surefeed microchip feeder is unique because it only opens for the right pet's chip, ideal for multi-cat households with prescription diets, but the lack of scheduling power is why it sits at nine. PetSafe Smart Feed 2 is the basic option and basic is fine if your pet's needs are basic.

highlights.title: Petlibro Granary Camera is the feeder I trust with weekend trips
highlights.body: 5 liter hopper, dual power so a blackout does not skip a meal, 1080p camera, two-way audio, and the desiccant bag keeps kibble fresh. At 169 dollars it is the cheapest top-tier feeder. I have left my cats with one for a 3-day trip three times without incident.

highlights.title: Petkit Yumshare Dual Hopper 2 solves the two-pets-two-diets problem
highlights.body: Independent 1.8 liter hoppers, separate schedules, single bowl with adjustable divider. The only feeder on the market that does this cleanly. If one cat eats wet weight management food and the other eats kitten kibble, this is the answer.

highlights.title: Petlibro Polar wet food feeder is the senior pet pick
highlights.body: Thermoelectric cooling keeps wet food fresh up to 6 days, 5 ice packs included, and the schedule supports up to 6 meals. For senior cats with kidney issues who need wet food and consistent timing, nothing else comes close.

highlights.title: Wopet Heritage View Dual Bowl is finally trustworthy after the May patch
highlights.body: The schedule drift bug that bothered me in March is fixed in the 2.4 firmware. Now the dual hopper plus the chunky camera is a legitimate Petkit alternative at 30 dollars less. If you missed the Petkit sale this is the runner-up that does not feel like a compromise.

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧餵食器這次母親節週末賣得很好，因為它是雙用途禮物，媽媽跟寵物都受惠。Petlibro Granary Camera 還是第一，1080p 相機、5 公升儲糧桶、雙電源、加上現在已經很成熟的 app，這是我唯一敢留給我家貓週末出門用的餵食器。Petkit Yumshare Dual Hopper 2 拿 9.0 分，講真的，兩隻寵物吃不同飼料的話，雙桶設計就是唯一合理的解。今天有動的是 Wopet Heritage View Dual Bowl，我自己往上推 0.1，因為五月韌體更新終於修掉了我之前在意的排程飄移 bug。Petlibro Polar 濕食餵食器是給老貓和小型犬不吃乾糧的隱藏選擇。母親節後 Chewy、PChome、momo 的庫存比平常健康，前三名沒缺貨。我一直跟大家講，買餵食器一定要選有備用電池的。雷雨天瞬斷電是餵食器最常見的故障原因，這份清單前段的全部都有。Surefeed 晶片餵食器是特別的存在，只認晶片開蓋，多貓家庭有特殊處方飼料時最適合，但沒排程功能所以排第九。PetSafe Smart Feed 2 是基礎款，如果你家寵物需求簡單，基礎款就夠了。

highlights.title: Petlibro Granary Camera 是我敢留週末出遊的餵食器
highlights.body: 5 公升儲糧、雙電源停電不漏餐、1080p 相機、雙向對講、附乾燥包保鮮飼料。約 NT$5,500 是頂級餵食器裡最便宜的。我留貓三次過夜，每次都沒出包。

highlights.title: Petkit Yumshare Dual Hopper 2 解決兩寵兩食的問題
highlights.body: 兩個獨立 1.8 公升儲糧桶、各自排程、單碗附隔板。市場上唯一乾淨解決這需求的機型。一隻吃濕的體重管理、一隻吃幼貓糧的話，就買這台。

highlights.title: Petlibro Polar 濕食餵食器是老貓最佳解
highlights.body: 熱電冷卻濕食保鮮 6 天、附 5 個冰寶、排程支援 6 餐。腎臟病老貓需要吃濕食又要準時，沒別家機器跟得上。

highlights.title: Wopet Heritage View Dual Bowl 五月更新後終於可信
highlights.body: 三月在意的排程飄移 bug 在 2.4 韌體修掉了。雙桶加大顆相機現在是合理的 Petkit 替代品，便宜 NT$900。錯過 Petkit 促銷的話，這台是不委屈的次選。

references.title: PetLibro Granary Camera firmware adds portion control by camera
Petkit YumShare Dual Hopper 2 review by Wirecutter
Whisker Feeder Robot subscription pricing change

en.commentary: PetLibro Granary Camera holds first and the firmware update this week adds camera-based portion control, which uses the existing camera to verify dispense accuracy. This is the kind of clever feature that uses existing hardware in a new way. First place locked in. Petkit YumShare Dual Hopper 2 got a fresh Wirecutter review this week confirming the dual-hopper story is the right pick for multi-pet homes. Score holds, second place unchanged. PetLibro Polar Wet Food stays at third for wet-food households. Wopet Heritage View Dual Bowl holds fourth. PetLibro One RFID stays at fifth. Petkit YumShare Solo Camera, HomeRunPet PF20, and Whisker Feeder Robot are unchanged. Whisker raised subscription pricing this week, which weakens the Feeder Robot's value argument; ranking holds but the longer-term case is now harder to defend.

highlights.title: PetLibro Granary Camera portion-control AI uses existing hardware cleverly
highlights.body: Firmware uses the existing camera to verify dispense accuracy, which is the kind of clever feature that uses existing hardware in a new way. First place locked in and the no-subscription value story stays unmatched.

highlights.title: Petkit YumShare Dual Hopper 2 wins multi-pet households
highlights.body: Wirecutter review confirms the dual-hopper story is the right pick for multi-pet homes. The independent hopper architecture is genuinely the right design for households feeding multiple pets with different diets. Second place locked in.

highlights.title: Whisker Feeder Robot subscription change weakens value story
highlights.body: Subscription pricing change weakens the Feeder Robot's longer-term value argument. Ranking holds but the case for choosing Whisker over the PetLibro and Petkit alternatives is now harder to defend on cost-per-year math.

zh-tw.commentary:
PetLibro Granary Camera 守住第一，這禮拜韌體加入相機分量控制，用現有相機驗證分量準確度。這是聰明地用既有硬體做新功能的案例。第一名鎖定。

Petkit YumShare Dual Hopper 2 這禮拜拿到 Wirecutter 新評測，確認雙料槽故事對多寵物家庭是正確選擇。分數守住，第二名不動。PetLibro Polar Wet Food 守第三，濕食家庭首選。Wopet Heritage View Dual Bowl 守第四。PetLibro One RFID 守第五。

Petkit YumShare Solo Camera、HomeRunPet PF20、Whisker Feeder Robot 都沒動。Whisker 這禮拜訂閱漲價，Feeder Robot 的 C/P 值說服力變弱，排名守住但長期算盤更難打。

highlights.title: PetLibro Granary Camera 分量控制 AI 聰明地用既有硬體
highlights.body: 韌體用既有相機驗證分量準確度，這是聰明地用既有硬體做新功能的案例。第一名鎖定，免訂閱 C/P 值故事還是無人能敵。

highlights.title: Petkit YumShare Dual Hopper 2 拿下多寵物家庭
highlights.body: Wirecutter 評測確認雙料槽故事對多寵物家庭是正確選擇。獨立料槽架構真的是不同飲食多寵物家庭的正確設計。第二名鎖定。

highlights.title: Whisker Feeder Robot 訂閱改版削弱 C/P 值故事
highlights.body: 訂閱定價改版削弱 Feeder Robot 的長期 C/P 值說服力。排名守住但相對 PetLibro 跟 Petkit 替代方案，每年成本算盤現在更難打。

references.title: PetLibro Granary Camera Apple Home integration feedback loop
Petkit AI ecosystem health dashboard expanding from CES 2026 rollout
PetLibro Polar Refrigerated Wet Food Feeder summer promo

en.commentary: PetLibro Granary Camera holds first and the AppleInsider piece from two days ago landed at the right time because it flags the exact missing piece (Apple Home empty-hopper status and feed-now action) that PetLibro should ship next, and the existing camera-based portion-control firmware from last week is already closing the trust gap on dispense accuracy. First place locked in. Petkit YumShare Dual Hopper 2 with Camera stays at second and the company's CES 2026 AI ecosystem rollout is now reaching the health-dashboard milestone, where data from feeders, fountains, and litter boxes unifies into one view. For households with multiple Petkit devices that consolidation is genuinely useful, especially for tracking subtle changes in feline urinary health. Score holds. PetLibro Polar Refrigerated Wet Food Feeder kicked off a summer promo this weekend that matters because wet-food spoilage risk climbs sharply in May humidity. Third place locked in. WOpet Heritage View Dual-Bowl Camera Feeder, PetLibro One RFID, Petkit YumShare Solo Camera, HomeRunPet PF20, and Whisker Feeder Robot are unchanged. The no-subscription value gap between PetLibro/Petkit and Whisker continues to widen.

highlights.title: PetLibro Granary Camera trust gap on portion accuracy is closing
highlights.body: Last week's camera-based portion-control firmware is doing real work and the AppleInsider piece flagged the exact Apple Home gap PetLibro should close next. The product roadmap visibility helps the first-place case. Locked in.

highlights.title: Petkit health dashboard milestone unifies multi-device pet data
highlights.body: Feeders, fountains, and litter boxes now feeding one health view is the genuine workflow unlock for households with multiple Petkit devices. Useful for spotting subtle changes in feline urinary health. Second place unchanged.

highlights.title: PetLibro Polar summer promo lands as humidity raises spoilage risk
highlights.body: Wet-food spoilage risk climbs sharply in May humidity. Summer promo on the only credible refrigerated wet-food feeder is correctly timed. Third place locked in for wet-food households.

zh-tw.commentary:
PetLibro Granary Camera 守住第一，AppleInsider 兩天前那篇文章來得正是時候，直接點出 PetLibro 接下來該補的 Apple Home 缺口（料槽空了的狀態回報、餵食按鈕），上禮拜推送的相機分量控制韌體本來就在解決分量準確度的信任問題。第一名鎖定。

Petkit YumShare Dual Hopper 2 守第二，他們從 CES 2026 開始鋪的 AI 生態這禮拜推進到健康儀表板里程碑，餵食器、飲水機、貓砂盆的資料整合進同一個畫面。家裡有多台 Petkit 裝置的人，這個整合是真的好用，特別是要追貓咪泌尿系統健康的細微變化。分數守住。

PetLibro Polar 冷藏濕食餵食器這個週末開了夏季促銷，這個時間點重要，因為台灣五月的悶熱濕氣已經把濕食腐壞風險拉得很高。第三名鎖定。

WOpet Heritage View 雙碗相機餵食器、PetLibro One RFID、Petkit YumShare Solo Camera、HomeRunPet PF20、Whisker Feeder Robot 都沒動。

PetLibro 跟 Petkit 對上 Whisker 的免訂閱 C/P 值差距還在拉大。台灣這邊 momo 跟 PChome 上 Granary Camera 大概落在 NT$3,500 左右，這個價位幾乎是無腦推。

highlights.title: PetLibro Granary Camera 分量準確度信任缺口正在補上
highlights.body: 上禮拜的相機分量控制韌體在做實事，AppleInsider 那篇直接點出 PetLibro 接下來該補的 Apple Home 缺口。產品路線圖能見度幫第一名站穩。鎖定。

highlights.title: Petkit 健康儀表板里程碑整合多裝置資料
highlights.body: 餵食器、飲水機、貓砂盆的資料進到同一個健康畫面，是家裡有多台 Petkit 裝置的人真正的工作流升級。對抓貓咪泌尿系統健康細微變化有用。第二名不動。

highlights.title: PetLibro Polar 夏季促銷剛好遇上濕氣拉高腐壞風險
highlights.body: 台灣五月的悶熱濕氣已經把濕食腐壞風險拉很高。市面上唯一站得住腳的冷藏濕食餵食器在這個時間點做促銷，時機抓得很準。濕食家庭第三名鎖定。
